debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ 0 < List.length (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive ⋯)

failed_attempts:
(by
        have h_nonempty : List.length (ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive _) > 0 := by
          apply Nat.succ_pos'
        exact Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero (by simpa using h_nonempty.ne')

(by
          apply Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero
          intro h_len_zero
          have h_empty : ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive (by
            intro h_eq
            have h_u_has_var : ∃ x ∈ u, Sum.isLeft x := by
              rw [← h_eq] at h_starts_in_1
              simp [ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition] at h_starts_in_1
              cases u
              case nil => contradiction
              case cons x xs =>
                cases xs
                case nil =>
                  have h_x_in_u : x ∈ [x] := by simp
                  exact ⟨x, h_x_in_u, by
                    rw [h_eq] at h_exhaustive
                    simp [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
                    have h_x_not_right : ¬ Sum.isRight x := by
                      intro h_right
                      have h_v_no_var : ∀ y ∈ v, Sum.isRight y := h_exhaustive
                      rw [h_eq] at h_v_no_var
                      apply h_v_no_var x (by simp)
                      exact h_right
                    exact Sum.isLeft_of_not_isRight h_x_not_right⟩
                case cons x' xs' =>
                  contradiction
            have h_v_no_var : ∀ x ∈ v, Sum.isRight x := h_exhaustive
            have h_u'_eq_v : u' = v := by
              apply Eq.symm
              apply Eq.symm
              rw [← sound]
              exact dstep.result
            rw [h_u'_eq_v] at h_v_no_var
            have h_u'_no_var : ∀ x ∈ u', Sum.isRight x := h_v_no_var
            have h_dstep_has_var : ∃ x ∈ u, Sum.isLeft x := by
              cases dstep
              case mk prod pre suf h_sound =>
                have h_lhs_in_u : Sum.inl prod.val.lhs ∈ pre ++ [Sum.inl prod.val.lhs] ++ suf := by
                  simp
                rw [ContextFreeDerivationStep.u_composition] at h_lhs_in_u
                exact ⟨Sum.inl prod.val.lhs, h_lhs_in_u, by
                  simp [Sum.isLeft]⟩
            have h_contra : False := by
              apply h_u_has_var
              intro x hx h_left
              have h_x_in_v : x ∈ v := by
                rw [h_eq]
                exact hx
              have h_x_right : Sum.isRight x := h_exhaustive x h_x_in_v
              contradiction
            contradiction) = [] := by
            rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h_len_zero
            exact h_len_zero
          cases dstep
          case mk prod pre suf h_sound =>
            cases prod.val.rhs
            case nil =>
              simp [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes] at h_empty
              contradiction
            case cons x xs =>
              simp [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes] at h_empty
              contradiction

(Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero (by
        intro h_len_zero
        have h_empty : ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive (by

            exact h_u'_has_var

          rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h_len_zero
          exact h_len_zero
        cases cfd

        case step dstep' derivation' sound' =>
          simp_all [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes]

          have h_dstep'_var : Sum.inl dstep'.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by

              rw [h_v_from_x] at h_exhaustive_v
              have h_result_no_var : ∀ x ∈ dstep'.result, Sum.isRight x := h_exhaustive_v
              have h_lhs_in_result : Sum.inl dstep'.prod.val.lhs ∈ dstep'.result := by
                apply ContextFreeDerivationStep.var_in_result dstep'
              exact h_result_no_var (Sum.inl dstep'.prod.val.lhs) h_lhs_in_result

(by

          have h_empty : ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive (by

            have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
              rw [← h_eq] at h_exhaustive
              simp [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
              have h_u_len_pos : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
              cases u with
              | nil => contradiction
              | cons x xs =>
                have h_xs_nil : xs = [] := by
                  simp [List.length_cons] at h_u_len_pos
                  omega
                subst h_xs_nil
                exact ⟨x, by simp⟩
            have h_v_no_var : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := h_exhaustive
            have h_step_produces_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u', Sum.isLeft symbol := by
              apply ContextFreeDerivationStep.produces_variable dstep
            have h_derivation_exhaustive : derivation.exhaustiveCondition := by
              apply ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep derivation sound rfl

            have h_contradiction : False := by
              apply h_v_no_var'
              exact (h_step_produces_var).choose_spec
            contradiction) = [] := by
            rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h_len_zero
            exact h_len_zero
          cases dstep.prod.val.rhs with
          | nil =>
            have h_u'_len : u'.len = u.len - 1 := by
              rw [sound, dstep.len_result_composition]
              simp [ContextFreeDerivationStep.len_u_composition dstep]
            have h_u_len_pos : u.len = 1 := h_starts_in_1
            rw [h_u_len_pos] at h_u'_len
            have h_u'_len_zero : u'.len = 0 := by omega
            rw [h_u'_len_zero] at h_empty
            simp at h_empty
          | cons x xs =>
            have h_nonempty_rhs : dstep.prod.val.rhs ≠ [] := by simp
            have h_at_least_one_child : True := by trivial
            contradiction)

(by
        have h_nonempty : List.length (ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive (by
          intro h_eq

                have h_x_is_left : Sum.isLeft x := by

              case cons y ys => contradiction
          have h_v_no_var : ¬ ∃ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isLeft symbol := by

              have h_dstep_sound : dstep.result = u' := sound
              simp [ContextFreeDerivationStep.result] at h_dstep_sound

                rw [h_dstep_sound]

              rw [h_u_comp, Word.len_mul, Word.len_mul, Word.len_mk_cons, Nat.add_assoc]
              omega
            have h_suf_len_lt_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len := by
              have h_u_comp : u = dstep.pre * Word.mk [Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs] * dstep.suf := dstep.sound
              rw [h_u_comp, Word.len_mul, Word.len_mul, Word.len_mk_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm]
              omega
            have h_left_count : dstep.pre.len < u.len := h_pre_len_lt_u_len
            have h_right_count : dstep.suf.len < u.len := h_suf_len_lt_u_len
            simp [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes, h_constructor, h_left_count, h_right_count]
          case cons x xs =>
            simp [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes, h_constructor]

            | intro symbol h_symbol h_symbol_left =>
              have h_symbol_right : Sum.isRight symbol := h_no_var_in_u symbol h_symbol
              contradiction
          have h_nodes_nonempty : List.length (ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive h_step_applied) > 0 := by
            apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero
            intro h_empty'
            have h_no_nodes' : ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive h_step_applied = [] := by
              rw [h_empty']
              simp
            have h_first_node_exists : ∃ node, node ∈ ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive h_step_applied := by
              apply List.exists_mem_of_length_pos
              exact h_nodes_nonempty
            contradiction
          exact h_nodes_nonempty
        exact h_nonempty)

(by
        have h_nonempty : List.length (ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive (by
          intro h_eq
          have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
            rw [← h_eq] at h_starts_in_1
            simp [ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition] at h_starts_in_1
            cases u
            case nil => contradiction
            case cons x xs =>
              cases xs
              case nil =>
                have h_x_in_u : x ∈ [x] := by simp
                have h_x_is_left : Sum.isLeft x := by
                  rw [← h_eq] at h_exhaustive
                  simp [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
                  have h_x_in_v : x ∈ v := by simp [h_eq]
                  specialize h_exhaustive x h_x_in_v
                  contradiction
                exact ⟨x, h_x_in_u, h_x_is_left⟩
              case cons y ys => contradiction
          have h_v_no_var : ¬ ∃ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
            rw [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
            intro h
            obtain ⟨symbol, h_mem, h_left⟩ := h
            specialize h_exhaustive symbol h_mem
            contradiction
          have h_u_ne_v : u ≠ v := by
            intro h
            rw [h] at h_u_has_var
            obtain ⟨symbol, h_mem, h_left⟩ := h_u_has_var
            apply h_v_no_var
            exact ⟨symbol, h_mem, h_left⟩
          exact h_u_ne_v)) > 0 := by
          cases cfd
          case same h => contradiction
          case step dstep' derivation' sound' =>
            simp [ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes]
            have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
              rw [ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition] at h_starts_in_1
              cases u
              case nil => contradiction
              case cons x xs =>
                cases xs
                case nil =>
                  have h_x_in_u : x ∈ [x] := by simp
                  have h_x_is_left : Sum.isLeft x := by
                    rw [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
                    have h_x_in_v : x ∈ v := by
                      rw [← sound']
                      simp [ContextFreeDerivationStep.result]
                      apply Or.inl
                      apply Or.inr
                      simp
                    specialize h_exhaustive x h_x_in_v
                    contradiction
                  exact ⟨x, h_x_in_u, h_x_is_left⟩
                case cons y ys => contradiction
            omega
        exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro h; simp_all at h)

(by
        cases dstep.prod.val.rhs with
        | nil =>
          apply Nat.succ_pos'
        | cons _ _ =>
          apply Nat.succ_pos'

(by
        apply Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero
        intro h_len
        simp [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h_len
        have h_empty := h_len
        have h_nonempty : List.length (ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes cfd h_exhaustive _) > 0 := by
          cases dstep.prod.val.rhs
          case nil =>
            apply Nat.succ_pos
          case cons x xs =>
            apply Nat.succ_pos
        contradiction)
